query:
ALTER TABLE contacts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS owner2FirstName VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS owner2LastName VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingAddress TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingCity VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingState VARCHAR(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingZip VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone2 VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone3 VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone1Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone2Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone3Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2qHFUVLEiSi1rhu.93857a1cce27 --database ZmWErA2ykcLEoPSCsQ2gyW --execute 
ALTER TABLE contacts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS owner2FirstName VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS owner2LastName VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingAddress TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingCity VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingState VARCHAR(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mailingZip VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone2 VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone3 VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone1Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone2Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone3Status ENUM('untouched','messaged','replied','opted_out','dnc','needs_reskip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untouched';
